steps.title: Identify the conclusion
steps.content: Researchers concluded that the transition from stagnant lid to plate tectonics happened around 3.2 billion years ago. Plate tectonics allows lithosphere and mantle material to mix; before then, they didn't.

steps.title: Pick the supporting finding
steps.content:
We need evidence that after 3.2 Bya, mixing began. Choice B says mantle-derived rocks younger than 3.2 By contain material also found in lithospheric rocks — direct evidence of mixing post-3.2 Bya, exactly what plate tectonics would produce.

A describes a continuous correlation, C is about diversity (not mixing), and D is about relative abundance — none directly show the mixing onset.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
